As we've been discussing, one of the most important skills you can master when trying to uncover black swans is to learn your counterparts' religion. Whether it's an actual religion or simply just a set of morals they adhere to, once you understand your counterparts' religion and can visualize what they truly want, you can employ those aspirations as a way to accomplish significant influence. Let me ask you a quick question. Think back to when you were a child and imagine the dream job that you wanted. This could have been an astronaut, doctor, professional athlete, or whatever. Now, would you say that you realize your childhood dream and are currently working in a field related to said dream?
